dh34.description: Invalid original caller in delegation call
dh34.action: The pool that initiated the delegation call does not match. If you believe this is a bug, contact the team on Discord.

dh36.description: Self-call not allowed in delegation callback
dh36.action: Delegation callback sub-transactions cannot target the pool itself. If you believe this is a bug, contact the team on Discord.
